lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no visible wear. Mechanically, all components, including the engine and transmission, are in perfect working order and have been maintained to factory standards.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver, though it now shows clear signs of age and regular use. The exterior has noticeable paint fading on the roof and hood, along with several scuffs and minor door dings consistent with its history. Inside, the cabin is functional but the upholstery shows significant wear and some staining in the cargo area. Mechanically, the car starts and runs, but it will soon require attention to the suspension and a set of new tires. This is an ideal option for a buyer looking for a budget-friendly vehicle who is willing to invest in some cosmetic and mechanical upkeep.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in wonderful shape and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. It shows some minor, expected signs of use, but overall it’s a solid, clean car that’s ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately. A truly dependable choice for anyone looking for quality and value!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly a collector-grade example that looks and feels as if it just left the showroom. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, scratches, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery remains supple with no signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is in perfect working order, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history. This car has been kept in a climate-controlled environment and presents an exceptional opportunity for a buyer seeking an as-new experience.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining on the seats. All mechanical systems are currently operational, but the vehicle may require some upcoming maintenance.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and sustained value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to mechanical integrity and aesthetic standards, ensuring continued reliability and presence on the road. We invite you to experience this exceptional example of automotive engineering.

Hey everyone! I'm super excited to find a new home for my trusty car! 🚗 It's been such a reliable ride and is still in really solid shape, perfect for your daily commutes or weekend adventures. It’s been well-loved and is ready to hit the road with you today. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to chat!

Offered is a mechanically sound 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine. This high-revving, naturally aspirated powerplant delivers linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. The
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance. Ready for immediate sale.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, perfect for someone looking for a dependable daily driver that still turns heads. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, and while there are a few minor stone chips on the front fascia and light surface swirls consistent with careful use, the body is straight and free of any major blemishes. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the premium leather upholstery is supple, showing only light creasing on the driver’s side bolster. All electronic components, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, function exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in robust health—the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and I have kept up with all scheduled maintenance, including recent fluid changes and a multi-point inspection. It sits on a set of high-quality all-season tires with significant tread depth remaining. This is a solid, turn-key vehicle that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, this unit offers a balanced synthesis of performance and longevity. Our rigorous inspection process ensures that all primary systems operate within optimal parameters, providing a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. This offering is positioned as an exceptional value for those prioritizing dependable quality and professional-grade standards.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust mechanical integrity, this unit offers an exemplary balance of performance and long-term reliability. Its current state reflects a history of diligent care, ensuring a premium driving experience and aesthetic presence. This is a premier opportunity to secure a high-caliber vehicle at a strategic valuation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a dream to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-maintained over the years—perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken care of the regular maintenance, so it’s ready for your next adventure! Come take it for a spin, I think you’ll love it as much as I have!

Well-maintained vehicle. Clean title. Regular service history. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This vehicle is a remarkable example of well-maintained engineering, presenting in a condition that will satisfy any discerning driver. The exterior is finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been regularly waxed, showing only the lightest of road-wear consistent with careful use. All body panels are straight, and the factory alloy wheels remain crisp and clean. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the leather seating surfaces are supple and free of any significant wear or cracking, while the carpets have been protected by floor mats since day one. Every piece of technology, from the premium audio system to the responsive navigation display, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health. It features a complete service history with recent preventative maintenance, including a fresh oil change and a comprehensive brake inspection. The engine pulls smoothly through the gears, and the suspension remains tight and quiet over uneven surfaces. This is a turnkey opportunity to own a reliable, high-performance vehicle that has clearly been a point of pride for its previous owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with proven reliability. Thoroughly inspected and prepared for immediate service, this specimen stands as a testament to responsible ownership and remains in commendable operational order.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which stands as a testament to diligent ownership and consistent mechanical stewardship. Exhibiting a refined balance of performance and reliability, this automobile has undergone a thorough professional evaluation to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic presentation. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated vehicle that performs with distinction and preserves its long-term value.

This 2019 Lexus RX 350 is a prime example of a well-cared-for vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The Atomic Silver exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor, unavoidable stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the Parchment leather interior is remarkably clean; the seats remain firm and supportive, though you’ll find the expected light creasing on the driver’s side bolster from regular entry and exit. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the premium Mark Levinson sound system, functions exactly as intended.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this automobile offers a sophisticated driving experience characterized by reliability and performance. Its well-preserved condition reflects a history of attentive care, ensuring it meets our rigorous standards for quality and long-term value. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the superior engineering and distinguished presence of this exceptional example.
